UCL GLORY: Was Thierry Henry really the ultimate big-game striker?

Samuel Eto'o has THREE Champions League titles, scoring in TWO separate finals. Henry? Just ONE, and that was after leaving Arsenal. Eto'o delivered when the stakes were highest. Brutal truth for the record books!
